violations.text: The walk-in refrigerator unit was observed with an elevated ambient temperature (56 degrees). Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Unit was not being used for TCS foods at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Accumulation of ice was observed in the walk-in. Walk-in to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
